scripts.build: pnpm --filter @controle-financeiro/shared-contracts build && pnpm --filter @controle-financeiro/finance-core build && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @controle-financeiro/shared-contracts build && pnpm --filter @controle-financeiro/finance-core build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @controle-financeiro/shared-contracts build && pnpm --filter @controle-financeiro/finance-core build && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules jest --config jest.config.mjs
